description: MES-213 persona fixture: sector-agnostic B2B funding marketplace (Swoop-style) entering AU — exercises finding 3 (no 'all industries' catch-all: end_buyer_industries left empty, so the lead-ICP gate falls back to the company's own sector) and the token-based sells-into↔leads alignment. Post-fix diff should show lead lists and buyer-facing surfaces widening beyond fintech.

intake.primary_goals: Access qualified lead lists; Find vetted service providers; Connect with trade & investment agencies; Get market & industry research
intake.key_challenges: Finding distribution partners, Brand awareness, Competing with incumbents
intake.report_focus: How do we reach Australian SMEs across every industry, not just fintech?

target_customers.notes: any Australian SME that needs funding — we are sector agnostic

raw_input.target_customer_description: B2B customers — Mixed — via self-serve / marketplace — any Australian SME that needs funding — we are sector agnostic
